title: SHUBEIEUMI 6pcs Fine Detail Paint Brush Set, Miniature Brush, Brush for Fine Detailing & Art Painting, for Nail Art, Acrylic, Watercolour, Oil Painting, Model Making and Line Painting
features: The package contains 6 pieces detail brushes in the size 00000, 000, 00, 0, 1, 2, for different needs.Each brush tip is suitable for drawing different things.

Our fine detail brushes have handy triangular wooden handles, comfortable to grip, can effectively relieve hand fatigue. In addition, the triangular handle also prevents the brush from rolling off the table.
Fine detail brushes are ideal for all detail paintings, fills, acrylic and oil paintings, edge mixing, detail coating, fine lines, watercolor and writing.

The nylon bristles of the miniature brush are heat-resistant, wear-resistant and flexible. They have strong absorption, the colors are full and even. The surface of the handle is coated with a black layer, to protect the handle from aging.
You just need to put the brush in warm water and wash the paint and use your fingers to gently reshape the brush hairs, you get a clean brush.
description: Artist brushes perfect for painting This detail brush set is used to add very fine detail to your painting. Especially suitable for drawing lines. General purpose Perfect for acrylic painting, watercolor, oil, tempera, body, nails, face painting, miniature, model, comics, ceramics, arts and crafts painting,chalk, craft painting, fine brushstrokes Universal Compatibility The detail brush set will be a great gift for kids, beginners, kids, students, amateurs, artists, professional painters

product_details_tab_data.title: XSHOT Small Dual Stream Water Blaster by ZURU Dual Play Water Toy, Dual Stream Blaster, Water Toy for Children, Teen and Adults
features: DUAL STREAM: Blast water from 2 nozzles with Dual Stream action!
RAPID-FILL: Dunk the tip of the blaster into water, pull the handle to fill, then blast away!
WATER BLASTING ACTION: Blast water up to 30 feet/ 9 meters.
WATER CAPACITY: This action packed water blasters can hold up to 300ml / 10 Fl Oz. of water.
PACK INCLUSIONS: 2 x X-Shot Small Dual Stream Water Blaster
